Developer & Designer

Swiggy Food Delivery REST API

Scalable Food Ordering Backend

Built a production-grade REST API for a food delivery platform with role-based authentication, optimized database queries, and clean layered architecture supporting 100+ endpoints.

Key Features
  • 100+ REST API endpoints for users, restaurants, orders & cart management
  • Role-based authentication & authorization with Spring Security
  • 30% improvement in database query response time
  • Layered architecture: Controller → Service → Repository → Database

Full-Stack Web Application

Developed a comprehensive full-stack web application for pet adoption with secure authentication, seller verification, real-time availability tracking, and 70% automation.
